results.title: Tangled
results.why_similar: A sheltered, long-haired protagonist yearns for freedom from a secluded life and defies a controlling parental figure to explore the human world and find love.

results.title: The Princess and the Frog
results.why_similar: Features a transformative bargain that changes the protagonist's physical form, leading to an adventure about love and discovering what truly matters.

results.director: Ron Clements, John Musker, Don Hall, Chris Williams
results.title: Moana
results.why_similar: A spirited young woman defies her father's rules to embark on a transformative ocean voyage, discovering her true identity and destiny with the help of a magical demigod.

results.title: Luca
results.why_similar: A young sea creature with a deep curiosity about the human world transforms to live on land, hiding his true identity while seeking adventure and friendship.

results.title: The Little Prince
results.why_similar: A young girl's life is transformed by a magical story from another world, exploring themes of imagination, holding onto wonder, and challenging rigid adult expectations.

results.title: Spirited Away
results.why_similar: A young girl is thrust into a strange, magical world where she must undergo a personal transformation, show courage, and find her way back to her family.

results.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson
results.title: Cinderella
results.why_similar: A kind-hearted young woman trapped in a restrictive home life has her destiny transformed by magic to find true love and a sense of belonging.

results.title: The Magician's Elephant
results.why_similar: An orphaned boy undertakes a seemingly impossible quest, guided by magical intervention, to find a lost family member and mend his broken world.

results.title: Drifting Home
results.why_similar: It features a magical ocean adventure where characters must navigate a new, watery world, similar to Ariel's journey of discovery.

results.title: The Sea Beast
results.why_similar: It centers on a human forming a bond with a misunderstood sea creature, challenging societal norms, much like Ariel's relationship with the human world.

results.title: Frozen
results.why_similar: It features a protagonist with a hidden, magical nature who must leave her home to discover her true self and find where she belongs.

results.title: Frozen II
results.why_similar: The heroine journeys into an enchanted realm connected to her past, answering a call to discover her destiny, akin to Ariel's quest for her true place.

results.title: Mirai
results.why_similar: It involves a protagonist experiencing magical, transformative adventures that help them understand their family and their own role within it.

results.title: The Dragon Prince
results.why_similar: It features a forbidden alliance across different species/worlds and a quest that bridges divided realms, similar to Ariel's cross-species love and conflict.

results.title: Sleeping Beauty
results.why_similar: A princess is constrained by protective rules and faces a powerful magical antagonist, culminating in a story of true love breaking a curse.

results.title: The Incredibles 2
results.why_similar: While not oceanic, it explores a character (Elastigirl) stepping into a new, exciting world outside her home, creating familial tension, similar to Ariel's dual-life conflict.

results.title: Vivo
results.why_similar: It shares the theme of a character embarking on a perilous journey driven by love and music, much like Ariel's journey for love and a new world.

results.title: Paddington 2
results.why_similar: It centers on a kind-hearted, optimistic outsider who brings positive transformation to a community, similar to Ariel's effect on the human world.

results.title: Treasure Planet
results.why_similar: It features a rebellious young protagonist seeking adventure and forming a transformative father-son bond, echoing Ariel's journey of self-discovery and strained parental relationship.

results.title: Pocahontas
results.why_similar: It revolves around a young woman from a different world who falls into a forbidden romance that bridges two cultures, mirroring Ariel's cross-world love story.

results.title: Mulan
results.why_similar: It features a young woman who transforms her identity and defies societal expectations to find her true place, paralleling Ariel's desire to be part of a different world.

results.director: Mark Andrews, Brenda Chapman, Steve Purcell
results.title: Brave
results.why_similar: It focuses on a headstrong princess in conflict with her parent's traditions, leading to a magical bargain that transforms their relationship, similar to Ariel's clash with King Triton.

results.title: Beauty and the Beast
results.why_similar: It involves a young woman yearning for adventure who sacrifices herself for family and finds love through a transformative magical curse, much like Ariel's deal with Ursula.

results.title: Hercules
results.why_similar: It follows a protagonist who feels like an outsider in his world and must prove himself through a journey to find where he truly belongs, akin to Ariel's quest.

results.title: Klaus
results.why_similar: It features a selfish protagonist whose journey leads to personal transformation and reconciliation in a community, echoing Ariel's role in bridging two worlds and changing herself.

results.title: Aladdin
results.why_similar: It centers on a character who uses magic to transform their identity and win love, while learning about authenticity, similar to Ariel's magical bargain and journey.

results.title: Your Name
results.why_similar: It shares the core theme of a yearning, fantastical connection that transcends a seemingly impossible divide, much like Ariel's longing for a different world.

results.director: Jared Bush, Byron Howard, Charise Castro Smith
results.title: Encanto
results.why_similar: It features a protagonist who feels like an outsider in her own family and yearns for a different place or purpose, echoing Ariel's sense of not belonging.

results.title: Brother Bear
results.why_similar: The protagonist undergoes a magical transformation into another being, leading to a journey of understanding a world different from his own, similar to Ariel's experience.

results.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
results.why_similar: It centers on a character who bridges two different worlds (human and dragon), fostering understanding much like Ariel does between the sea and the surface.

results.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
results.why_similar: The protagonist embarks on a quest to heal a fractured world by seeking out a mythical being, paralleling Ariel's journey to unite her world with another.

results.title: Atlantis: The Lost Empire
results.why_similar: It follows an outsider who yearns for adventure and discovers a hidden, magical world, mirroring Ariel's curiosity and discovery of the human world.

results.title: A Whisker Away
results.why_similar: It involves a magical transformation to connect with a love interest and explore a different identity, closely mirroring Ariel's bargain to become human for love.

results.title: Elemental
results.why_similar: It features a 'forbidden' connection between characters from different worlds who challenge societal norms, directly paralleling the central romance of The Little Mermaid.
